items.title: The Hands
items.description: Inspired by 'The Creation of Adam.' Depicts the need for an extraterrestrial or divine intervention.

images.alt: The Hands — panel one, black lines on white canvas
images.note: First panel of the piece, in black over white.

images.alt: The Hands — panel two, glowing hand on black canvas
images.note: Second panel of the same piece, inverted in tone.

items.title: The Forest of Life
items.description: A foggy, misty forest with no visible end or beginning. Inspired by being lost in life.
items.alt: The Forest of Life — textured acrylic painting of bare trees in fog

items.title: IT'S Yours
items.description: Depicts the act of handing over what is dearest to you, what you need to survive.
items.alt: IT'S Yours — a heart painted in black over a red canvas

items.title: Circle
items.description: The circle of life; not all death is ugly or sad.
items.alt: Circle — wire butterfly and ink skull drawing on canvas

items.title: Red Strings (I)
items.description: The red string of life, tangled and coming apart. Inspired by the Norns of Northern mythology.
items.alt: Red Strings (I) — red thread drawing over black and white sketchbook page

items.title: Red Strings (II)
items.description: Some strings follow you all the way; others are only tangled with you for a time, for better or worse.
items.alt: Red Strings (II) — red thread drawing on white sketchbook page

items.title: Ho9e
items.description: A hand reaching out towards the good and beautiful. Inspired by Banksy. Sold at the Filmantiq exhibit, 2023.
items.alt: Ho9e — spray paint hand and butterfly on teal canvas

items.title: Flutter
items.description: Like your heart, a butterfly's wings flutter. Inspired by 'Hold Me Tight' (2004) by Bjørn Agertved.
items.alt: Flutter — black spray paint butterfly on yellow canvas

items.title: FLY H–GH
items.description: Sometimes you need help to leave the ground. Doesn't make you any less beautiful.
items.alt: FLY H-GH — blue and purple butterfly painting

items.title: I Wanna Live Not Just Survive
items.description: The need to live, to move on, not just be stuck in routines, and especially not get left behind by the bus of life.
items.alt: I Wanna Live Not Just Survive — stenciled text and angel wing painting

items.title: Splinters & Beams
items.description: We spend so much time judging others, often making larger mistakes ourselves. We fail to see the beam in our own eye.
items.alt: Splinters & Beams — large glowing hand pointing, spray paint on grey panel

items.title: Parasitic Rose
items.description: A rose leaching off of a heart. Someone came into my life, grew, and left.
items.alt: Parasitic Rose — graphite drawing of a rose growing from an anatomical heart, burnt paper edges

items.title: Self Portrait
items.description: The moment of confidence sparked by momentary self-appreciation.
items.alt: Self Portrait — black and white paper-cut portrait

items.title: The Pull
items.description: There is a pull only a rose can create.
items.alt: The Pull — rose and hand illustration on a blue circle over black canvas

items.title: Expression
items.description: Hands are what we use to express ourselves, so I made one to express me.
items.alt: Expression — hand sculpture made of woven black wire

items.title: Lies
items.description: What is the perfect crime? A lie — you steal someone's right to the truth, and often get away with it. Published in Ojo Vulgar 'El Crimen Perfecto.'
items.alt: Lies — stenciled figure with an X above the head on a blue background

items.title: But Can It Flλ?
items.description: Inspired by 'Isn't It Time To Let It Fly?' by Bjørn Agertved.
items.alt: But Can It Fly? — blue butterfly painting on orange-bordered canvas

items.title: Tokyo Study
items.description: Inspired by 'TOKYO' by TITOMULK.
items.alt: Tokyo Study — power lines and utility pole painted on purple canvas

items.title: Rough Edges
items.description: We all have rough edges and issues, just in different ways. What appears perfect is, on closer look, just as imperfect. Published in Ojo Vulgar Horssérie BIZARRES.
items.alt: Rough Edges — line drawing of eyes and rose petals in coloured pencil

items.title: Red Strings (III)
items.description: The thread leaves the page and lands on stone; what holds you together doesn't need to be delicate to still be real.
items.alt: Red Strings (III) — red yarn spiral over a light cement panel
